decision: No-Go for R4 training under the pre-registered PAD-top2 neighbor-domain-knowledge claim
reasoning: Train split preliminary gate fails because PAD top2 non-self CE is worse than bottom2 and random mean, though train CE is saturated near zero.
Val split preliminary checks pass, but shuffled PAD top2 has lower CE than PAD top2, so the apparent gain is not uniquely attributable to PAD ranking.
All forced-view perturbations are nonzero but small; top2 val anchor-view JSD is about 1.42e-05 and train top2 JSD is about 2.57e-07.
Duplicate anchor is exactly identical to anchor, validating the scoring path; anchor direct verification max abs diff is 0.0 on checked batches.
recommended_next_step: Do not freeze r4_gate_config.yaml or start R4 seed42 training. Record R4 forced-view validity as No-Go/Feasible-B-at-most and continue candidate race with DCA/source-view sensitivity or feature-aware PAD frozen gates.
